mapper.sql: id, employee_id, leave_type_id, start_date, end_date, status, reason, start_period, end_period, proof_attachment_url, rejection_reason, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM leave_applications WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY start_date DESC
SELECT FROM leave_applications WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_applications SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, leave_type_id = #{leaveTypeId}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status}, reason = #{reason}, start_period = #{startPeriod}, end_period = #{endPeriod}, proof_attachment_url = #{proofAttachmentUrl}, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
